prompt: Write a 12-month feature roadmap for openpatent.ai organized in 4 quarterly themes. Each quarter: theme (≤6 words), 3 flagship features, 2 supporting features, 1 customer-facing milestone, 1 internal milestone. Quarter 1 (NOW→Q1 2027) — 'Multi-region sovereignty': flagship (1) cross-region CometBFT replication, (2) geo-routing DNS, (3) FedRAMP Moderate path, supporting (1) HSM root rotation, (2) public-light-client for verify.openpatent.ai, milestone = 3 sovereign temples live, internal = 22/33 BFT cross-region test. Quarter 2 — 'BFT council at scale': (1) council-public-review log, (2) slashing evidence chain, (3) council-vote API, supporting (1) council-member dashboard, (2) ethics-committee charter, milestone = 1,000 council-reviewed disclosures, internal = 8 of 33 validators geographically distributed. Quarter 3 — 'IP boutique workflow': (1) white-label disclosure portal, (2) client-intake form, (3) prior-art crosswalk, supporting (1) retainer billing, (2) client-portal MCP, milestone = 50 IP boutiques deployed, internal = $2.4M ARR. Quarter 4 — 'AI-asset registry': (1) model-weights hash format, (2) dataset-CID anchoring, (3) MCP-tool-invention registry, supporting (1) HuggingFace plugin, (2) arXiv pre-print hook, milestone = 10,000 AI-asset disclosures, internal = $6.8M ARR. Use DEFENEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {quarters:[{q:int, theme:string, flagship:[3 strings], supporting:[2 strings], customer_milestone:string, internal_milestone:string}]}.
